allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@fluentui/react-icons'\); const eyeIcons = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('eye'\) && k.endsWith\('Regular'\)\); console.log\(eyeIcons.join\('\\n'\)\)")
